title: Flodesk vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Flodesk and Constant Contact. Find pricing, features, and ratings to choose the best email marketing tool for your business.
h1: Flodesk vs Constant Contact: Complete Comparison
intro: Flodesk and Constant Contact are both established email marketing platforms, but they cater to different business types and priorities. Flodesk focuses on design-first campaigns with unlimited subscribers, while Constant Contact emphasizes affordability and integrated marketing tools. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right fit for your business needs.
choose_a_if: You prioritize beautiful, visually-stunning email designs for your brand
You want unlimited subscribers with predictable flat-rate pricing
You're a designer, photographer, or visual-focused brand needing professional templates
choose_b_if: You need the lowest possible starting price for a tight budget
You want integrated event management, SMS, and social media advertising features
You're a nonprofit or local business needing comprehensive marketing tools beyond email

faq.q: Is Flodesk better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: Flodesk excels for design-focused businesses with higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.7 vs 2.8 on Trustpilot), while Constant Contact offers more integrated features and lower entry costs. The better choice depends on your priorities: design quality and simplicity versus affordability and marketing tools.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at $12/month, making it significantly cheaper upfront than Flodesk's $38/month entry point. However, Constant Contact's pricing scales with subscriber count, while Flodesk charges a flat rate for unlimited subscribers, potentially favoring growing businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list imports, making migration straightforward. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber list and import it into another platform, though you may need to redesign campaigns using Flodesk's templates.
